description: Style NoteCreated using canvas, this range of canvas from converse have a retro feel. Team it with jeans and a uber-cool t-shirt. Product DetailsNavy blue canvas with central lace-ups, overlays and stitched detailingLong canvas tongueThick rubber midsoleTPU outsole with lugs and patterned grooves Material and CareCanvasMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
